mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fines (user_id, borrow_record_id, amount, status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{borrowRecordId}, #{amount}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM fines WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT f.id AS fine_id, f.amount AS fine_amount, br.id, br.user_id, br.rfid_tag, br.borrow_date, br.due_date, br.return_date, br.renew_count, br.is_p2p_transfer, br.transfer_from_user_id, bm.title AS book_title FROM fines f INNER JOIN borrow_records br ON f.borrow_record_id = br.id LEFT JOIN book_items bi ON br.rfid_tag = bi.rfid_tag LEFT JOIN book_metadata bm ON bi.isbn = bm.isbn WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.status = 'Unpaid'
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) FROM fines WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'Unpaid'
